title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, the factory-building game, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. This demonstrates the model's ability to handle complex, multi-step planning and execution in a dynamic game environment.
writeup: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio autonomously, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. The demonstration tests the model on complex, multi-step planning and execution inside a dynamic game environment. The takeaway: the run exercises autonomous planning and spatial reasoning, with the model handling factory construction end to end.
